sqls.name: Overview_View
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Status_Analysis.churn_score FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

sqls.name: Exploration_Seniority_View
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_Seniority_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.senior_citizen, Status_Analysis.churn_value FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

sqls.name: Exploration_Marriage_Status_View
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_Marriage_Status_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.married, Customer_Info.partner, Customer_Info.dependents, Status_Analysis.churn_label FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

sqls.name: Exploration_Churn_Reasons_View
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_Churn_Reasons_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.partner, Status_Analysis.churn_category FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

sqls.name: Insight_Location_View
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Insight_Location_View AS SELECT Location_Data.customer_id, Location_Data.city, Location_Data.latitude, Location_Data.longitude, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Location_Data.total_population FROM Location_Data JOIN Status_Analysis ON Location_Data.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;
